Bluffdale, UT · 84065

Your Bluffdale Remodeling Specialist

In Bluffdale, we regularly work near Bluffdale Main Street and Bangerter access and throughout Independence neighborhoods, where homeowners need bathroom upgrades that fit local housing conditions. From newer homes and mixed-age properties, we solve common issues like builder-grade waterproofing issues while delivering clean tile work, reliable waterproofing, and straightforward project communication.

Brian Deveraux personally manages each Bluffdale job from estimate through final walkthrough, so scope, pricing, and timeline stay clear from day one. We also complete projects in Riverton and Herriman when nearby homeowners want the same craftsmanship.

Bluffdale Homes Need Utah-Specific Work

Salt Lake County hard water is tough on grout, tile, and shower surrounds. Devco uses proper waterproofing, epoxy grout where it makes sense, and proven installation methods designed for Utah conditions.

What We Do in Bluffdale

Remodeling Services for Bluffdale Homeowners

Every service below is available for Bluffdale homeowners, from custom tile showers to basement finishing and full bathroom renovations.

Bathroom Remodeling

Full gut renovations to complete refreshes. Custom tile showers, new vanities, flooring, fixtures, and professional waterproofing built to handle Utah's hard water and freeze-thaw conditions.

Full GutCustom TileVanitiesWaterproofing
Get a Free Bluffdale Quote →

Custom Tile Showers

Large-format, hex mosaic, marble-look porcelain — installed with proper waterproofing and epoxy grout designed to resist Utah hard water. Built to last 20+ years, not just pass inspection.

Large FormatHex MosaicEpoxy GroutNiches
Get a Free Bluffdale Quote →

Sentrel Shower Systems

The smart choice for rental units, ADUs, and budget-conscious bathrooms. Solid-surface panels, no grout lines, no sealing, built to handle renter traffic. We'll tell you honestly when Sentrel makes more sense than tile.

No Grout LinesRental-GradeADU ReadyBudget-Smart
Get a Free Bluffdale Quote →

Basement Finishing

Turn unfinished square footage into livable, rentable space. Framing, drywall, flooring, lighting, egress windows, and bathroom rough-in — all built to Bluffdale and Salt Lake County code.

FramingDrywallEgressBathroom Add-On
Get a Free Bluffdale Quote →

Why Bluffdale Homeowners Choose Devco

What Sets Us Apart in Bluffdale

Bluffdale homeowners choose Devco — with the same standards we bring to every zip code.

👷

Brian on Every Job

Brian personally manages every Bluffdale project and is your single point of contact from estimate to final walkthrough. No surprises about who shows up or what gets done.

🌊

Built for Bluffdale Water

Bluffdale sits in one of the hardest water zones in Salt Lake County. We use epoxy grout and proper waterproofing specifically chosen for Utah's mineral-heavy water.

💬

Honest About Sentrel

We'll tell you when Sentrel makes more sense than tile for your Bluffdale project. We're not upselling — we're building referrals from honest work.

📋

Permits Handled

Where required, we pull all Bluffdale and Salt Lake County permits and manage the inspection process. Your remodel is done to code.

⏱️

2-Hour Response

Every estimate request gets a response within 2 hours during business hours. No waiting around for a call back that never comes.

📅

Family Legacy Since 1980 · Utah Est. 2021

Brian's father started Devco in Southern California in 1980. Brian reopened the Utah operation in 2021 carrying that same name and standard. Every job has the family name on it.

How It Works

Your Bluffdale Remodel, Step by Step

From first call to final walkthrough.

1

Free Estimate

Brian visits your Bluffdale home, walks the space, and gives you a detailed itemized estimate. No vague ballparks.

2

Clear Scope

We agree on exactly what's being done, what materials are used, and how long it takes. Everything in writing before work starts.

3

Permits Pulled

Where required, we pull all permits and schedule inspections. You don't navigate city hall — we handle it.

4

Work Begins

Brian manages every project personally. You get updates throughout. Job site cleaned at the end of every workday.

5

Final Walkthrough

We don't call it done until you walk through and approve every detail. If something isn't right, we fix it before we invoice.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
"Brian and his team were absolutely amazing. Professional, detailed and trustworthy. We couldn't be happier with our new bathroom remodel."
— Natalie B., Salt Lake City, UT  ·  Verified Yelp Review

Common Questions

Bluffdale Remodeling FAQ

Answers to the questions Bluffdale homeowners ask most.

If your project moves plumbing, electrical, or structure, yes. We handle Bluffdale permit and inspection requirements so your remodel stays code-compliant.
In Bluffdale, we frequently find builder-grade waterproofing issues, especially in newer homes and mixed-age properties around Independence neighborhoods. We fix root causes with proper waterproofing, substrate repair, and long-lasting finishes.
Most Bluffdale bathroom projects land between $8,000 and $25,000 depending on layout changes, tile scope, and fixture selections. We provide itemized pricing before demo starts.
Most remodels in Bluffdale take 1 to 3 weeks. Full gut projects with custom tile and plumbing updates can run longer, and we provide a clear schedule up front.
Yes. If we uncover moisture damage, we repair affected framing and substrate before finishing work so your new bathroom is built on a sound, dry base.
Yes. We regularly complete bathroom and basement projects in nearby cities and keep the same owner-managed process from estimate to final walkthrough.

Recent Local Work

Recent Bathroom Remodeling Project in Bluffdale

We recently completed a Sentrel shower system upgrade for a homeowner near Bluffdale Main Street and Bangerter access. The bathroom had recurring builder-grade waterproofing issues, so we rebuilt the wet area with updated waterproofing and cleaner finishes. The result was easier upkeep, better daily function, and a space that finally matched the home.
